message:
test(conformance): parity packet fixtures for FP-P2D-051/130/148-168 edge cases

Adds 30 new strict-mode conformance packet fixtures covering adversarial /
edge-case behavior for DataFrame aggregation and transformation operations
that the existing FP-P2D-135..171 bundle left uncovered. All fixtures are in
the canonical packet schema (packet_id, case_id, mode=strict, operation,
frame, expected_series/dataframe).

Coverage:

- FP-P2D-051 dataframe_count
  * all_missing_strict: every cell null across columns in non-default order
  * explicit_column_order_strict: count respects declared column_order

- FP-P2D-130 dataframe_abs / clip / round
  * abs_all_missing_column_order_strict: abs over all-null frame honors
    column_order for the output
  * clip_lower_only_strict / clip_upper_only_strict: one-sided clamp contracts
  * round_all_missing_column_order_strict: rounding all-null columns keeps
    order stable
  * round_duplicate_index_strict: rounding with a duplicate index label
  * round_negative_decimals_strict: negative "decimals" (tens/hundreds rounding)

- FP-P2D-148 dataframe_idxmax
  * nonnumeric_nan_strict: non-numeric entries treated as NaN for argmax
  * ties_first_strict: ties resolve to the first index ("first-wins")

- FP-P2D-149/151..158 skips-nonnumeric column-order aggregates (strict)
  * dataframe_sem, dataframe_kurtosis, dataframe_sum, dataframe_mean,
    dataframe_std, dataframe_var, dataframe_min, dataframe_max,
    dataframe_median: each drops non-numeric columns while preserving
    declared column order

- FP-P2D-159 dataframe_any / FP-P2D-160 dataframe_all
  * all_missing_column_order_strict: pure-null frames still respect column
    order in the resulting series
  * utf8_truthy_strict: utf8 truthiness semantics

- FP-P2D-165 dataframe_head / FP-P2D-166 dataframe_tail
  * negative_n_strict: negative n semantics (skip from the other end)
  * negative_n_saturates_empty_strict: |n| larger than length saturates
    to an empty frame (not an error)

- FP-P2D-167 dataframe_skew / FP-P2D-168 dataframe_prod
  * mixed_symmetric_strict: symmetric distribution yields near-zero skew
  * skips_nonnumeric_order_strict: skew/prod drop non-numeric, keep order

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
